summary: Raw WBAL-TV news footage of a Maryland sheriff speaking at a podium surrounded by other uniformed sheriffs, demanding lawmakers stop blocking cooperation with ICE. Straight talking-head press-conference clip with a station bug, no music or stylized editing.
notable_text: WBAL-TV 11 bug; tweet quote: 'Lawmakers need to wake up and realize the American people want public safety over politics, and they're not getting it!'
